transactions.desc: The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Andrew Baker to the Colorado Rockies.
The Rockies recalled Thompson from Triple-A Albuquerque on Friday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
The Tigers recalled Hanifee from Triple-A Toledo on Friday.
The Angels selected Meckler's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Angels optioned Lowe to Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Angels selected Walton's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Yankees activated Caballero (finger) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Yankees activated Cole (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Guardians optioned Heuer to Triple-A Columbus on Friday.
The Guardians activated Pallette from the paternity list Friday.
The Royals designated Diaz for assignment Friday.
The Royals recalled Tolbert from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The Mets designated Kimbrel for assignment Friday.
The Mets recalled Tong from Triple-A Syracuse on Friday.
The Reds activated Suarez (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Cardinals recalled Torres from Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Mariners optioned Joe to Triple-A Tacoma on Friday.
The Mariners activated Robles (pectoral) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Astros selected Santa's contract from Triple-A Sugar Land on Friday.
The Giants selected Bericoto's contract from Triple-A Sacramento on Friday, Susan Slusser of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.
The Cubs recalled Ramirez from Triple-A Iowa on Friday, Jesse Rogers of ESPN.com reports.
The Twins recalled Gonzalez from Triple-A St. Paul on Friday.
The Red Sox selected Guerrero's contract from Triple-A Worcester on Friday.
Jones was optioned to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre following Thursday's 2-0 loss to Toronto, Gary Phillips of the New York Daily News reports.
Cruz was optioned to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre after Thursday's 2-0 loss to the Blue Jays.
Palmquist was designated for assignment by the Rockies on Thursday.
Stevens had his contract selected from Triple-A Albuquerque and is starting Thursday's contest at second base against the Diamondbacks.
Peralta was optioned to Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday.
Castano was called up from Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday.
The Red Sox optioned Zack Kelly to Triple-A Worcester on Thursday, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
